V0200A09B_BHVRL_CPL_CD V0200A09B Behavioral Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Behavioral Symptoms care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
582 V0200A10A_ACTVTY_CTR_CD V0200A10A_ACTVTY_CTR_CD V0200A10A Activity Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Activity CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
583
